title: calamintha alpina var. cuneata
intro: Calamintha alpina var. cuneata, also known as Alpine Calamint, is a variety of the Calamintha alpina plant, belonging to the mint family and native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues, headaches, and muscle cramps. The health benefits of Alpine Calamint include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and reduce pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of Calamintha alpina var. cuneata include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its usage should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
